name: Financial Cents Accounting Workflow API
what_it_does: Financial Cents accounting workflow management REST API for small to mid-size CPA firms and bookkeeping practices to manage recurring client work, deadlines, and team capacity. Enables AI agents to manage recurring work and task automation for bookkeeping and accounting practice workflow, handle client communication and email integration for practice client management, access staff capacity and workload management for accounting team scheduling automation, retrieve deadline tracking and tax calendar for CPA deadline automation, manage client onboarding workflow for practice client intake automation, handle document collection and request management for client deliverable automation, access time tracking and billing for accounting practice revenue automation, retrieve practice analytics and throughput metrics for firm performance reporting, manage workflow template creation and recurring task scheduling for practice standardization, and integrate Financial Cents with QBO, Xero, and email for SMB accounting practice management.
use_cases: Managing recurring work from bookkeeping automation agents
Tracking deadlines from tax calendar automation agents
Managing capacity from accounting team scheduling agents
Reporting throughput from practice analytics agents
not_for: Enterprise CPA firms with complex multi-entity structure (use Karbon)
best_when: A small to mid-size CPA firm, bookkeeping practice, or accounting service wanting AI agents to automate recurring client work scheduling, deadline tracking, staff capacity management, and client communication within Financial Cents.
avoid_when: CLIENT CONFIDENTIALITY IN SHARED WORKFLOW VIEWS: Financial Cents team workflow views may expose client work status to all team members; automated workflow routing must enforce client access controls if practice serves clients with confidentiality requirements between staff. RECURRING TASK AUTOMATION HOLIDAY CALENDAR: Automated recurring task scheduling via Financial Cents must account for tax filing deadline holiday adjustments; standard recurring task schedules without holiday-adjusted deadline logic create missed filing deadline risk for client deliverables due near holidays. BILLING AUTOMATION UNBILLED TIME CAPTURE: Automated billing via Financial Cents time tracking must capture all billable time before invoice generation; automated invoice generation without confirming all time entries are captured creates revenue leakage for time-and-materials accounting engagements.

auth.notes: Financial Cents uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Atlanta, Georgia HQ. Founded 2018 by Genius Arabo and Ruben Ugarte. Private (~$10M raised). Focused on small to mid-size bookkeeping and accounting practices. Recurring work management, team capacity, client portal, and deadline tracking. QBO and Xero integration. Gmail and Outlook email integration. Competes with Karbon, TaxDome, Canopy, and Jetpack Workflow for accounting practice management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier for solo practitioners; limited features and client count
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly subscription for teams; Growth and Scale tiers with increasing features
pricing.notes: Atlanta GA. Private. Founded 2018. Per-user subscription. Free tier for solo practitioners. Growth and Scale tiers for teams.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; work item and client queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required for status changes

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — STATUS CHANGES REQUIRE POLLING: Financial Cents does not support native webhooks for work item status changes; automated workflow triggers based on task completion or deadline approach require scheduled polling; implement polling interval aligned with practice workflow cadence (hourly for deadline-sensitive tasks, daily for recurring work review)

API KEY FULL ACCOUNT ACCESS WITHOUT SCOPE: Financial Cents API key provides full account access without scope controls; automated agents with API key have read/write access to all client and work data; implement separate API key per integration use case and rotate keys when staff access changes; no fine-grained permission model available

RECURRING WORK SCHEDULING TIMEZONE HANDLING: Automated recurring task creation via Financial Cents must specify client timezone for deadline-accurate scheduling; recurring work created without timezone context may schedule at wrong local time for clients in non-US-Eastern timezones; explicitly pass timezone on all recurring work creation

CAPACITY CALCULATION EXCLUDES PTO AND HOLIDAYS: Financial Cents capacity management tracks hours per week per staff member but does not automatically deduct PTO and holidays; automated capacity-based routing without PTO calendar integration creates overallocation during staff absence periods; sync PTO calendar before automated capacity-based work assignment

DUPLICATE WORK ITEM ON RETRY: Financial Cents work item creation API lacks idempotency keys; automated work item creation with network retry may create duplicate work items for same client and period; implement client+period+work_type uniqueness check before automated work item creation to prevent duplicate billing and duplicate client requests

CLIENT PORTAL EMAIL COMMUNICATION THREADING: Financial Cents client portal email threading may not match external email clients; automated email responses sent via Financial Cents API may not thread correctly with client Gmail or Outlook threads; advise clients to use portal for automated communication workflows rather than relying on email thread continuity
agent_readiness.security_notes: Accounting workflow. SOC2. API key. US. Client financial records and accounting work data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Accounting workflow. SOC2. API key. US. Client financial and work data.
